title: Ybella Systems
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ybella Systems''' was a software company that produced the Ybella Systems "Starfighter Training" program, which helped inexperienced [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] learn how to pilot their ships.

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Ybella Systems "Starfighter Training" program'' is an in-game help and manual for pilots in [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']]. It is displayed in the [[Wikipedia:Head-Up Display|Head-Up Display]] of [[Starship/Legends|starships]] and explains the basic handling and piloting of ships.
